text: Everything around me seems empty and still, filled with shadows and the hum of fluorescent lights. As I drift through this silent hallway and past a wall of ideas about research and development, I sense a tension between innovation and abandonment. I feel curious, yet also uneasy. The odd angle and dim light distort my perception, pushing me to question the purpose of these spaces and my own presence here. I am suspended between the promise of progress and the isolation of a forgotten corridor.
